formulas.name: isShippingItem
formulas.expression: OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運搬費"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運送費") )

formulas.name: isSupplementalItem
formulas.expression: OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運搬費"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運送費"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ユニック"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "宅急便") )

formulas.name: tempPrimarySortOrder
formulas.expression:
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "値引"), 9999,
IF( OR( {!$Record.ST_item__c} = "異形棒鋼", CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "異形丸鋼") ), 1,
IF( OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ネジ鉄筋"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ﾈｼﾞ鉄筋") ), 2,
IF( AND( ISBLANK({!$Record.MakerCode__c}), OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運搬費"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運送費") ) ), 9995,
IF( AND( ISBLANK({!$Record.MakerCode__c}), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ユニック") ), 9996,
IF( AND( ISBLANK({!$Record.MakerCode__c}), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "宅急便") ), 9997, NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: tempSortOrder
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "値引"), 9999, IF( OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運搬費"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "運送費") ), 9995, IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ユニック"), 9996, IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "宅急便"), 9997, IF( OR( {!$Record.ST_item__c} = "異形棒鋼", CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "異形丸鋼") ), 1, IF( OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ネジ鉄筋"), CONTAINS({!$Record.ST_item__c}, "ﾈｼﾞ鉄筋") ), 2, NULL ) ) ) ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: 【納入実績】ソート順の割り当て {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: 【納入実績】ソート順の割り当て

recordLookups.name: getDeliveryRecordForProductsWithoutPresetSortOrder
recordLookups.label: getDeliveryRecordForProductsWithoutPresetSortOrder
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9

recordLookups.name: getMainItemForPrimarySort
recordLookups.label: getMainItemForPrimarySort
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND NOT(6) AND NOT(7) AND NOT(8)

subflows.name: invokeAssignNonProductSortOrderSubflowWhenShippingItem
subflows.label: サブフロー：【納入実績】非製品ソート順割り当て処理_WhenShippingItem

subflows.name: invokeAssignNonProductSortOrderSubflowWhenTakkyubin
subflows.label: サブフロー：【納入実績】非製品ソート順割り当て処理_WhenTakkyubin

subflows.name: invokeAssignNonProductSortOrderSubflowWhenUnic
subflows.label: サブフロー：【納入実績】非製品ソート順割り当て処理_WhenUnic

subflows.name: invokeAssignPrimarySortOrderToDeliveryRecordForProductsWithoutPresetSortOrder
subflows.label: 呼び出し：【納入実績】規定値なし製品に関連する正規ソート順の割り当て
